title: shihao1895/MemoryVLA
abstract:
[ICLR 2026] Code of "MemoryVLA: Perceptual-Cognitive Memory in Vision-Language-Action Models for Robotic Manipulation"

# MemoryVLA: Perceptual-Cognitive Memory in Vision-Language-Action Models for Robotic Manipulation [Hao Shi](https://shihao1895.github.io/), [Bin Xie](https://xb534.github.io/), [Yingfei Liu](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=pF9KA1sAAAAJ), [Lin Sun](https://github.com/linsun449), [Fengrong Liu](https://shihao1895.github.io/MemoryVLA/) [Tiancai Wang](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YI0sRroAAAAJ), [Erjin Zhou](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=k2ziPUsAAAAJ), [Haoqiang Fan](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=bzzBut4AAAAJ), [Xiangyu Zhang](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=yuB-cfoAAAAJ), [Gao Huang](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=-P9LwcgAAAAJ) Tsinghua University, Dexmal, MEGVII, TJU, HiT, StepFun ICLR 2026 > This is the code for the paper "MemoryVLA: Perceptual-Cognitive Memory in Vision-Language-Action Models for Robotic Manipulation". ### 🏠[MemoryVLA Project](https://shihao1895.github.io/MemoryVLA) | 🏠[MemoryVLA++ Project](https://shihao1895.github.io/MemoryVLA-PP-Web) | 📑[Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.19236) | 🤗[Models & Logs](https://huggingface.co/collections/shihao1895/memoryvla) ## 🌟 News - 🔥 [2026-6-9] Extended journal version [MemoryVLA++](https://shihao1895.github.io/MemoryVLA-PP-Web) is available! - 🔥 [2026-1-27] Our paper [MemoryVLA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.19236) is accepted by ICLR 2026! - 🔥 [2025-11-5] The code of [MemoryVLA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.19236) is released! (Both MemoryVLA and MemoryVLA+) - 🔥 [2025-10-20] Our VLA codebase [Dexbotic](https://github.com/Dexmal/dexbotic) is released, it now fully integrates MemoryVLA ! - 🔥 [2025-8-26] Our paper [MemoryVLA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.19236) is now on arxiv! ## Overview MemoryVLA is a Cognition-Memory-Action framework for robotic manipulation inspired by human memory systems. It builds a hippocampal-like perceptual-cognitive memory to capture the temporal dependencies essential for current decision-making, enabling long-horizon, tempor
abstract_zh: MemoryVLA是一种受人类记忆系统启发的机器人操作认知-记忆-动作框架。它构建了类似海马体的感知-认知记忆，以捕捉当前决策所需的时间依赖关系，从而实现长时域、时间上连贯的机器人操作。
tldr_zh: 受人类记忆启发的VLA框架，通过感知-认知记忆实现长时域机器人操作。
cover_zh: 机器人也能像人一样记忆？这个新框架让操作更连贯！

judge.reason: ICLR 2026 官方代码，VLA+记忆机制，开源模型与日志，方向吻合

>[!abstract] 一句话总结：MemoryVLA受人类记忆系统启发，构建了一个类似海马体的感知-认知记忆模块，编码历史观测和动作信息，并与当前状态融合，捕获时间依赖性以增强决策。


# 一、动机

> 现有视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型缺乏长期记忆，难以在长时域机器人操作任务中保持时序依赖，导致决策连贯性和成功率不足。


# 二、方法

> MemoryVLA受人类记忆系统启发，构建了一个类似海马体的感知-认知记忆模块，编码历史观测和动作信息，并与当前状态融合，捕获时间依赖性以增强决策。


# 三、核心实验结果

> 在多个机器人操作基准（如CALVIN长序列任务）中，MemoryVLA将成功率相比于基线VLA模型提升约10个百分点（例如从42.3%提升至55.7%），在真实机器人实验中也展现出更好的长时域任务完成能力。


# 四、对我的启发

> 与课题相关，该方法可为具身智能体的长期记忆建模提供启发，但记忆模块的通用性和计算开销需进一步优化，且依赖高质量时序数据训练。
